/usr/bin/c++  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -g -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  "CMakeFiles/kinfocenter-dmidecode-helper.dir/kinfocenter-dmidecode-helper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kinfocenter-dmidecode-helper.dir/helper.cpp.o" -o ../../../../bin/kinfocenter-dmidecode-helper  /usr/lib/libKF6AuthCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.7.2
